summary: Large stage decomp/matching PR for src/melee/gr/grzebes.c, with supporting GroundVars, headers, exported helper prototypes, and symbol metadata changes. Evidence shows many newly matched grZebes functions and partial improvements, while review focused on avoiding premature static/data ordering, using OSReport strings in-place, and relying on local const Vec3 initialization instead of separate static storage.

key_files.role: Primary decomp target; replaces many placeholders with grZebes functions, local structs, stage callback data, acid/bubble state code, OSReport use, material and zako-generator calls.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists 15 new matches and 17 improvements in main/melee/gr/grzebes
review_comments: PsiLupan comments on OSReport in-place use and statics

key_files.role: Adds/refines grZebes GroundVars union arms, including zebes3, zebes4, and zebes5 structs with offset-commented fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct grZebes_GroundVars and Ground.gv union additions

key_files.role: Adds or corrects public grZebes prototypes with recovered parameter and return types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZebes_801D8644, grZebes_801D881C, grZebes_801DA3F4(Vec3*), grZebes_801DCBFC(Ground_GObj*, HSD_GObj*, void*)

key_files.role: Makes grMaterial_801C8D44 non-static so grzebes can call it.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static Item_GObj* changed to Item_GObj* for grMaterial_801C8D44

key_files.role: Adds exported declaration for grMaterial_801C8D44 with callback types.
Refines grZakoGenerator_801CA43C prototype from unknown signature to typed parameters and s32 return.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS replaced with s32 grZakoGenerator_801CA43C(void*, HSD_JObj*, f32)

key_files.role: Adjusts grZe .data/.sdata2 symbol names, sizes, scopes, and local labels; renames grZe_803E1A30 to grZe_callbacks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZe_callbacks, @303, @186-@625 local labels, grZe_803E1B60 split

what_changed: Expanded grzebes.c from mostly placeholders into a large partial decomp with local structs such as grZe_ColorEntry, grZe_AcidLevelEntry, grZe_YakumonoParam, grZe_BubbleEntry, grZe_BubbleConfig, and grZe_AcidState.

Recovered or partially recovered numerous grZebes routines, including grZebes_801D8558, grZebes_801D8644, grZebes_801D881C, grZebes_801DA528, grZebes_801DAA08, fn_801DAC90, grZebes_801DB3CC, grZebes_801DBB60, grZebes_801DC260, grZebes_801DC408, grZebes_801DC744, grZebes_801DC9DC, and grZebes_801DCBFC.
Added includes needed by the recovered code, including dolphin OS, stage anime/display/datfiles/material, lb, mp, baselib jobj/lobj/gobjproc/gobjgxlink/random, and MSL math_ppc headers.
Added typed GroundVars for multiple grZebes variants in types.h and updated grzebes.h prototypes to match recovered bodies.
Exported grMaterial_801C8D44 through grmaterial.c and grmaterial.h for use by grzebes.c.
Refined grZakoGenerator_801CA43C header signature to s32 grZakoGenerator_801CA43C(void*, HSD_JObj*, f32).
Updated symbols.txt metadata around grZe data, including callback table naming, data string splits, and conversion of several sdata2 globals to local labels.
Bot report claims +5868 matched code bytes, +800 matched data bytes, 15 new matches, and multiple improved grzebes items; this is treated as report evidence, not independently revalidated here.

smart_moves.text: Header surfaces were updated where recovered bodies needed cross-file calls or better signatures, rather than hiding calls behind source-local unknown declarations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzakogenerator.h replaces UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for grZakoGenerator_801CA43C

smart_moves.text: GroundVars were moved toward typed offset-commented fields for grZebes-specific state instead of leaving all access as unknown storage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzebes.c uses gp->gv.zebes4 and gp->gv.zebes5 fields

smart_moves.text: Some generated/global-looking symbol metadata was narrowed to local labels in symbols.txt, consistent with not over-naming every float or string as a global.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZe_804DB088 and related sdata2 globals changed to @186, @187, @188, etc.
raw_diff: grZe_803E1B84 changed to @303 local string

decomp_lessons.lesson: For incomplete large stage files, avoid declaring many statics solely to preserve apparent data order; reviewers may prefer removing unproven statics until the file is correctly matched because later asserts or local evidence can reveal the real temporary names and ownership.
evidence_refs: review_comments: PsiLupan says remaining statics should probably be removed until correctly matched and warns about false impression of ordering

decomp_lessons.lesson: For OSReport-style error strings, compare local matched examples and try using the report call/string in place rather than introducing separate static storage for the format string.
evidence_refs: review_comments: PsiLupan asks whether these can be fixed to be used in-place and links grlast.c OSReport example
raw_diff: grZebes_801D8558 uses OSReport("%s:%d: couldn t get gobj(id=%d)\n", "grzebes.c", 256, id)

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function body proves a helper signature, update the owning header and linkage so callers can use the typed function directly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grMaterial_801C8D44 changed from static to exported and declared in grmaterial.h

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small local Vec3 constants may be expressible as direct aggregate assignments to local variables; review evidence says this can avoid extra const/static declarations in at least this grzebes context.
evidence_refs: text_corpus review_comment r2913021669: PsiLupan suggests pos1 = { 24.1f, -4.6f, 0.0f }; and pos2 = { 24.05f, 2.2f, 0.0f }; because they will be treated as const

naming_conventions.convention: Use a semantic name for a StageCallbacks table when the type/role is supported by usage and symbol metadata.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZe_803E1A30 renamed to grZe_callbacks in symbols.txt
raw_diff: StageCallbacks grZe_callbacks[] and grZebes_801D8558 indexes callbacks by id

naming_conventions.convention: For file-local recovered stage structs, prefix with the stage abbreviation grZe_ and retain offset-style field names where semantics are not fully proven.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct grZe_BubbleEntry with x00_active/x20_gobj
raw_diff: typedef struct grZe_AcidState with offset-commented fields

naming_conventions.convention: GroundVars union arms may be split into numbered stage-specific variants when multiple object layouts are recovered but semantic names are not established.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h adds struct grZebes_GroundVars3/4/5 and union arms zebes3/zebes4/zebes5

naming_conventions.convention: Use local label names for unproven local floats/doubles/strings instead of retaining global grZe address names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used typed temporary structs and offset-commented GroundVars to make large stateful stage code expressible in C while retaining exact layout evidence.
Used PAD_STACK and UNUSED padding in several recovered functions, which should remain narrow and evidence-backed because such stack-shaping is a matching tactic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff grep: PAD_STACK(0x10), PAD_STACK(12), PAD_STACK(8), PAD_STACK(0x30), UNUSED u8 _[4]

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted symbols.txt section metadata and local/global scope around grZe data to support data and sdata2 matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: .data grZe sizes/splits and .sdata2 local-label conversions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used local matched-source comparison for report formatting; reviewer pointed to grlast.c as an OSReport example for the same kind of cleanup.
evidence_refs: review_comments: PsiLupan links grlast.c#L217 as an example for the OSReport

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Asked whether OSReport-related statics/strings could be fixed to be used in-place, citing a grlast.c OSReport example.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Recommended removing the rest of the statics until the file is correctly matched, to avoid a false impression of ordering; noted an HSD_ASSERT may reveal the actual temp name for something like map_a_gobj.

review_feedback.author: jellejurre
review_feedback.feedback: Author asked whether the revised handling of statics was acceptable.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Responded that the revised static handling looked a lot better.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.feedback: Suggested direct aggregate assignments for pos1 and pos2 Vec3 values so they are treated as const and do not need separate declarations.

follow_up_queries: grzebes statics false impression ordering HSD_ASSERT map_a_gobj
Vec3 aggregate assignment treated as const pos1 pos2

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merge state, file counts, changed files
loaded_files: raw_diff.diff truncated but contains primary hunks
loaded_files: text_corpus.jsonl includes bot report and review comments
review_comments.md truncated but key review examples are present
notes: The raw diff and review comments are truncated in loaded context, so this intake only summarizes visible evidence and metadata-provided file list/counts.
The bot report provides matching percentages and new-match claims, but no independent build/objdiff was run during intake.
The PR body says the PR was mostly done with AI and cleanup was planned; this is author self-report and not used to infer code quality beyond evidence quality/context.
Some changed files, especially grzebes.c, have much more content than the excerpt; this record avoids enumerating all recovered functions unless visible in diff/report evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not keep unproven statics just to imply data order in incomplete files
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2232 review explicitly warned that statics in an incomplete grzebes.c file should probably be removed until the file is correctly matched because they create a false impression of ordering and later HSD_ASSERT/local evidence can reveal actual temporary names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzebes.c added static data and symbols.txt data changes

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer in-place OSReport form when local examples identify it
accepted_candidate_records.text: For grzebes OSReport cleanup, review requested using the OSReport string/call in-place and pointed to grlast.c as a local example, rather than preserving separate static report string storage.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Direct Vec3 aggregate assignments can replace separate local const storage in matching attempts
accepted_candidate_records.text: Reviewer suggested assigning pos1 and pos2 with aggregate literals directly; in this context they would be treated as const and separate declarations were unnecessary.

source_update_candidates.title: Warn against premature static-data ordering in partially matched files
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding a note to data/literal standards: in incomplete translation units, avoid keeping static arrays/strings/floats solely to imply data order; remove or narrow them until code, asserts, symbols, or local matched evidence prove ownership and names.
source_update_candidates.reason: This review gives concrete historical evidence for a recurring risk already covered by standards: false confidence from premature static ordering.

source_update_candidates.title: OSReport cleanup can use in-place string/call form when local examples match
source_update_candidates.text: Consider mentioning OSReport specifically under assert/report cleanup: when local matched files show the same report pattern, prefer the in-place OSReport string/call form rather than naming report strings as separate statics without ownership evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: Reviewer provided a concrete OSReport example and requested in-place cleanup.

source_update_candidates.title: grzebes stage code uses grZe-prefixed local structs and GroundVars variants
source_update_candidates.text: Candidate path fact: src/melee/gr/grzebes.c and src/melee/gr/types.h in PR #2232 introduced grZe_BubbleEntry, grZe_BubbleConfig, grZe_AcidState, grZe_YakumonoParam, and grZebes_GroundVars3/4/5 as local layout scaffolding for Zebes stage decomp.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local typedef additions in grzebes.c
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future searches in this path, but should be curated against current source before accepting.

rejection_notes: Do not promote all symbol.txt local-label changes from this PR as a general rule; the excerpt does not show enough ownership proof for each label.
Do not infer that AI-generated decomp is acceptable or unacceptable from the PR body alone; only review comments and diff evidence are used for lessons.
Do not treat PAD_STACK and UNUSED padding in this PR as style; standards require explicit verifier evidence and cleanup reasoning for such tactics.
